title: Synchronization of Bloch oscillations by gate voltage modulation
author: Erdmanis, Janis
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains relevant code and data used in the paper for exploring Bloch synchronization in a double phase slip junction setup. This project uses the Julia programming language with `DifferentialEquations.jl` library to produce beautiful ODE and SDE calculations for numerics. To reproduce the figures, follow `README.md` instructions.
steps_raw: This repository contains relevant code and data used in the paper for exploring Bloch synchronization in a double phase slip junction setup. This project uses the Julia programming language with `DifferentialEquations.jl` library to produce beautiful ODE and SDE calculations for numerics. To reproduce the figures, follow `README.md` instructions.
